long_description:
[COM]-kube-proxy pod is not ready [SAO] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_insufficient_running_pods_for_deployment.html
TIP Situation: Observed Pod Not Ready issue in Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready
TIP Short Description: A pod is not ready for the past 10 minutes
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone2u7:node:sao2-qz1-sr1-rk078-s17
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready{kube_pod_name=~"kube-proxy.*|device-agent.*|compute-agent.*"}) by (kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) < 1 = 0.9
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2u7' and kube_pod_name = 'compute-agent-j4g9h'

Time:             12/02/2025 11:13 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
